auditMetadata.description: Comprehensive branding audit of the original Impeccable Chrome extension repository

antipatternRuleIds.note: panel.js FIX_SKILLS uses 'icon-tile-stacked-above-heading' as key (old name), while detect-antipatterns.mjs uses 'icon-tile-stack'. This mismatch exists in the original.

extensionFiles.context: Logo symbol - the '/' character is the Impeccable brand mark
Empty state icon using '/' brand mark

iconSvg.content: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128"><rect width="128" height="128" rx="24" fill="#1a1a1a"/><line x1="76" y1="24" x2="52" y2="104" stroke="#f5f3ef" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
iconSvg.description: Dark rounded square with a diagonal slash line - the Impeccable '/' brand mark

CATEGORY_7_CHROME_WEB_STORE.description: Chrome Web Store ID and related references
CATEGORY_7_CHROME_WEB_STORE.note: The old Chrome Web Store ID is NOT in the extension code itself, only in site pages. A new CWS listing will get a different ID.

CATEGORY_8_HIDDEN_BRANDING.description: Branding in comments, metadata, directory names, and non-obvious locations

findings.replacement: Change to new package name if publishing

findings.context: Contains 'Editorial Magenta' brand color references throughout
findings.replacement: Update all oklch hue 350 to new brand hue

findings.context: Contains '/impeccable' in nav brand HTML and feature card title
findings.exactString: /impeccable polish and / Impeccable in component HTML

findings.context: SVG contains the '/' slash mark which is the Impeccable logo symbol
The '/' character IS the brand logo
Entire file is branding - product name, descriptions, URLs

CATEGORY_9_DIRECTORY_NAMES.description: Directory paths containing 'impeccable' in the repo
CATEGORY_9_DIRECTORY_NAMES.note: These skill directories are NOT included in the built extension. Only extension/ is packaged. However, skill scripts like impeccable-paths.mjs contain branding.

categories.identifiers: 50+ instances (CSS classes, data attributes, postMessage sources, port names, global vars)
categories.authorNames: 2 instances in extension files (STORE_LISTING.md, build scripts)
categories.iconReferences: 7 instances (logo symbol '/', icon file paths, SVG content)
categories.chromeWebStoreId: 0 instances in extension code (only in site pages)

criticalRiskAreas: Logo symbol '/' in panel.html and popup.html - EASY TO MISS in text search
icon.svg content - slash line IS the brand, not just a decorative element
detect-antipatterns.mjs has 86+ impeccable references that flow into the built detect.js
postMessage sources (impeccable-command, impeccable-results, etc.) must match between content-script.js and detect.js
Port name prefixes (impeccable-devtools-, impeccable-panel-, impeccable-sidebar-) must match between devtools/sidebar/panel JS and service-worker.js
__IMPECCABLE_CS_LOADED__ and __IMPECCABLE_CONFIG__ must match between content-script.js and detect.js
_impeccableOverlay property on DOM elements bridges detect.js internals
antipatterns.json extracted by build script - verify it has no branding strings
promo-small.png is a Chrome Web Store promotional tile image - likely contains 'Impeccable' branding visually

antipatternsJsonAudit.note: antipatterns.json is generated by build-extension.js from the ANTIPATTERNS array. It contains only id, name, category, description fields - NO brand strings. Verified safe.
